_comment: Synthetic Federal Bank NEOBANK/Fi (Epifi) savings golden vector (no real data). Ported from federal_bank.py; captured from a live run + balance_chain.check (RECONCILED). Fi layout: DD/MM/YYYY dates with both Withdrawal and Deposit columns (the empty side prints 0), WHOLE-NUMBER amounts, a masked account number, and an uppercase CR marker that is consumed but ignored — direction comes from the balance delta.
lines: The Federal Bank Ltd. NEO BANKING- EPIFI
Statement of account for the period of 08/04/2026 to 07/05/2026
